text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Got that right! But if you don't master it, you'll
end up just like I did. I don't want you quitting
before you've made it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That's right. Ryan, you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I got pounded into the dirt! I wasn't strong
enough back then, so that was part of it too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: (I understand. And I will never forget.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober and Ryan said they would come to cheer
me on at the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Satsuki Sho. Mejiro Bright's
eyes seem to wander.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, do you remember how nonchalantly Ryan
spoke of her loss at the Satsuki Sho?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I believe she was concealing her real feelings. On
that day, I was watching her very carefully...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aaaaauggggh! Why? Why?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry, Grandmother! You had such hopes
for me... since the day I was born! You never once
gave up on me! So why did I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: GWAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I didn't cry when watching her. I wanted to, but I
opened my eyes wide instead and listened closely
to her voice.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's burned into my memory. I'll never forget her
frustration, not until the day that I wash it away in
her stead.
choice_data_list: The day you wash it away...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And it's going to be today—because I will
use what Ryan taught me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
By running with the advice she's given me, I
wanted to alleviate her pain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Most Umamusume have but one chance at the
Triple Crown. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ryan has two... because I will run in her place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I originally thought it was simply coincidence that
we decided to rely on Ryan's coaching, but it
seems Mejiro Bright was being guided somehow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: To avenge Mejiro Ryan's loss.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: When I was very young, Ryan told me something.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No one knows if you can run fast or not. You're
not even grown up yet, so it's way too early to
tell.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You don't have a thing to worry about. Your
future is bright, and you'll get there at your own
pace.

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: The way you run will be your own. Right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's why I chose to believe in myself and run my
own way, because Ryan placed her faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you believe... that I can shine today?
choice_data_list: You can! Let's do this, your way!
You can! Let's do this, your way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's. You've walked with me all this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
So let's win this race for her and finish the day
with a smile.
